# calendarUnits

**Instance Property**

The calendar units to include in the formatted string.

## Declaration

```swift
var calendarUnits: NSCalendar.Unit { get set }
```

## Discussion

For a list of supported calendar units, see [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKDateTextProvider#Date-Format-Options].

## Getting the Date Information

- **date**: The date to display.
- **timeZone**: The time zone used in the formatted string.
- **uppercase**: A Boolean value that determines whether the date string displays in uppercase.
